Shobhit Bhaiya's exceptional guidance and warm hospitality made the entire experience seamless and enjoyable. I highly recommend Adventure Bag Club to anyone seeking an authentic and adventurous trip to the Himalayas.

All this activities done by the one and only ADVENTURE BAG CLUB this club provides many tours all around in india. My very first experience is very amazing with TAB CLUB thank u for organising such a amazing dreamy Himachal packages.

Whether it was chilling in Kasol, making snowballs in Rohtang, or losing our minds in Manali.

TAB! THE BEST COMMUNITY TO TRAVEL WITH!

The stay, food, travelling, games, activities and the whole team was just fabulous. You just simply cannot pick the negatives with them. It's not like you'll get bounded with them, you can roam around, explore cafes, do fun activities, and a lot more on your own too. The whole team is so warm hearted and kind, they ask for everybody's opinions, click your pictures, they'll assist you with everything, also they'll make you feel like you have known all those people since ages.
All I can say here is just go with them without having a second thought in your brain even for a minor second. And you'll have the best time of your life with TAB.

name: L Burdak
text: **The adventure bag club** provides professional and personalized service, ensuring a smooth experience. Highly recommended for adventure seekers and nature lovers! You'll leave with unforgettable memories and a big smile. Manali's magic is unmatched with **The adventure bag club**! 🌄😊

name: Sneha Sharma
text:
I recently embarked an unforgettable trip to Manali- kasol for my college trip and it was my first trip with my college friends that too apart from going on the competitions. So I can confidently say that as the name itself says adventure bag club it was a adventure of the lifetime. So let me share my personal experience with you all and why you should choose adventure bag club over any other organisations - I visited Manali - kasol from 19 April to the 25 April 2024. We travelled from Jaipur to Chandigarh via train then from Chandigarh to Manali - kasol via travellers. And let me tell you guys the trip cost us about 11k ( 6 nights 5 days) that too with all the facilities and obviously food was also good.
We began our journey by train, but my friends' and my seats were not together, so I asked Shobhit bhaiya to change our group seats, and he was gracious enough to do so. And you wouldn't believe it if I told you I asked him 100 times for something, and he always said yes without getting angry and always smiled. We arrived at Chandigarh around 7 a.m. and boarded the 16-seater travellers. We had two travellers, one with a 27-seater and the other with a 16-seater. My batch mates and I took seats in the 16-seater.Obviously, I can't forget to mention harsh bhaiya(MR gian), as I got one brother there. And believe me, travellers' journey from Chandigarh to Manali is the best experience of the entire trip. The estimated time from Chandigarh to Manali is 6 hours, but due to the breakfast - lunch break, it took nearly 10 hours. But now that I've completed the journey, I can say that I wish it had lasted longer than 10 hours because we had so much fun.
Even after we had seats, we were standing and dancing, and harsh bhaiya was kind enough to change the songs again and again with his me time, and joga paji, the one driving the travellers, was not too crazy with the wheels. We all thought that we had irritated him with all the loud music and shouting, but when we were on our way to Kasol, I asked him if he was irritated because of us or because we had troubled him so much.He responded with a smile on his face, saying he, too, enjoyed the Punjabi songs and that he was vibing with us. During the trip orientation, Shobhit Bhaiya stated that our trip is all about contingencies,If we have time, we will do additional activities that are not listed on the itinerary; we had assumed that nothing like this would occur. But, thanks to Shobhit bhaiya and Harsh bhaiya, our all buts and ifs plan was successful.
The next day, we went to Jogini waterfall. To be honest, I hadn't done many treks in my life, but the experience was unforgettable. While coming down from the waterfall, I became scared because the path was very slippery and I thought I wouldn't be able to descend.Thank you, Shobhit Bhaiya . I came down without getting much sacred as he was constantly encouraging and assisting me. And how these two cared for everyone on the trip was commendable. When a few of our batchmates became ill, they did everything possible to care for them.So the experiences I had were mesmerising, and I won't be able to express everything, so without a second thought, one should go on the trip with the adventure bag club.

name: Navay Verma
text: It's undeniably an extraordinary experience; the team operates like a closely-knit family. The tour was thoughtfully arranged, despite a few minor glitches, the group collectively surmounted them. The tour leaders exhibit genuine care for your well-being, and words can hardly convey the remarkable journey you'll embark on with Shobhit Bhaiya and his team.
